case_title: SALVADOR GONZALEZ VS. STATE FARM INSURANCE

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 (FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANT'S REQUEST) FILED BY GONZALEZ, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (MAILED TO:GUADALUPE SAENZ - INDEPENDANT ADJUSTER FOR STATE FARM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-22-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO STATE FARM INSURANCE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY TAMARA GOULDEN--CLAIM REPRESENTATIVE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, SALVADOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEIXAO, MICHELLE THE PARTIES AGREE TO ADD AS A DEFENDANT, MICHELLE MEIXAO, AND TO DISMISS STATE FARM INSURANCE WITH PREJUDICE. STATE FARM INSURANCE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND MICHELLE MEIXAO IS ADDED AS DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
